Activists have their sights set on horse racing

Nick says that with leadership a vaccine could transform the fight against TB
Nov 6, 2025

Speaking at the G20 Health Ministers’ meeting in South Africa, Nick warned that it would be a tragedy if the world failed to deliver an effective new TB vaccine.

Nick launches new Commission on Police Leadership
Oct 23, 2025

Nick will co-chair the review with Lord Blunkett to examine police leadership at all levels with the aim of ensuring that policing can respond to evolving threats and challenges and meet public expectations.

Read More →
Oct 23, 2025
Oct 16, 2025
The system of recording 'non-crime hate incidents' is no longer fit for purpose
Oct 16, 2025

In the House of Lords Nick says that an official review has concluded that reform is needed to ensure that policing can focus on genuine harm and risk within communities.
